use_cases: Boolean form input for accepting terms, conditions, or newsletter subscriptions
Multi-select checklist items in settings or filters
Task completion toggles in productivity applications
Selection controls in data tables for bulk actions
ai_summary: A checkbox component from Coss.com's design system built on Base UI. Features a polished, modern aesthetic with subtle shadows, border styling, and proper focus/hover states. Includes full accessibility support with aria-invalid states, disabled states, and dark mode variants. The component uses Tailwind CSS with CSS custom properties for theming and supports responsive sizing.
